title: Recover Rust SCHC and SenML validation
description: Recover IPv6 payload-length checks before SCHC profile slicing and SenML value/length/capacity invariants.
acceptance_criteria: No profile panics on truncated payloads; multiple/duplicate SenML values reject; overflow/capacity errors are exact; vectors/tests/clippy and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Transplanted 6-line IPv6 payload-length guard to headers.rs and ~80-line SenML CBOR invariants (MultipleValues, checked arithmetic, BufferTooSmall, RFC 8428 tests). Current HEAD passes cargo test --all-features and clippy with no panics on truncated payloads or duplicate values. no_std/heapless compliant.
